That, too, counts in this sort OF

Color, size, uniformity, shape and
blemish are the heads under which
they are judged--15 points is q
perfect mark for each.


DEMAND FOR SOUVENIRS.


The souvenir apple counter is do
ing rushing business at the show.
Small boxes of six or dozen are
sold for 35 cents and 81 and can
be shipped by express at the coun-
ter to any part Of the world. I'VE
shipped boxes to Panama, Aus
tralia and Paris yesterday" said
the young woman at the counter.
Lots of foreigners come In and
send boxes to the old country"


In the machinery room smoke
and the coughing of gasoline en-
gines predominate. 1t is busy
and smoky scene and is usually
filled with interested fruit growers.
